auth.welcomeTitle: Find trusted workers and shops near you
auth.accountCreatedMessage: Your account has been created successfully. You may register as a Worker or Business at any time from the menu on the Home screen.

location.permissionDeniedMessage: Allow location access to auto-detect your location, or enter it manually below.
location.detectFailedMessage: Something went wrong finding your location. Please enter it manually.

imagePicker.permissionDeniedMessage: Allow photo library access to add images.
imagePicker.pickFailedMessage: Something went wrong opening your photo library. Please try again.

workerProfile.title: Worker Registration
workerProfile.subtitle: Provide your service details to get discovered by customers nearby
workerProfile.successMessage: Your details are submitted for verification. We'll notify you once approved.
workerProfile.updateSuccessMessage: Your changes are submitted for verification. We'll notify you once approved.
workerProfile.deleteConfirmMessage: This removes your worker profile permanently. You can create a new one later if you change your mind.
workerProfile.deleteSuccessMessage: Your worker profile has been removed.

businessProfile.title: Business Registration
businessProfile.subtitle: Provide your shop details to get discovered by customers nearby
businessProfile.successMessage: Your shop details are submitted for verification. We'll notify you once approved.
businessProfile.updateSuccessMessage: Your changes are submitted for verification. We'll notify you once approved.
businessProfile.deleteConfirmMessage: This removes your business profile permanently. You can create a new one later if you change your mind.
businessProfile.deleteSuccessMessage: Your business profile has been removed.

languageSelect.title: Choose your language
languageSelect.subtitle: You can change this anytime in Settings.

home.subtitle: Here's what's happening nearby.
home.searchPlaceholder: Search for services or shops nearby

homeMenu.title: Triolo
homeMenu.subtitle: Grow with Triolo
homeMenu.registerWorkerSubtitle: Register your skills and receive requests nearby
homeMenu.registerBusinessSubtitle: Register your business and reach more customers

services.comingSoon: Browsing services by category is coming soon.

profile.logoutConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to logout from your account?

errors.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
errors.MOBILE_ALREADY_REGISTERED: This mobile number is already registered.
errors.ACCOUNT_NOT_FOUND: No account found for this mobile number.
errors.OTP_NOT_FOUND: No active OTP found. Please request a new one.
errors.OTP_EXPIRED: Your OTP has expired. Please request a new one.
errors.OTP_ATTEMPTS_EXCEEDED: Too many incorrect attempts. Please request a new OTP.
errors.OTP_CONTEXT_MISSING: Something went wrong with registration. Please start again.
errors.ACCOUNT_NOT_ACTIVE: This account has been suspended or blocked.
errors.VALIDATION_ERROR: Please check the details you entered.
errors.RATE_LIMITED: Too many attempts. Please wait a bit and try again.
errors.WORKER_PROFILE_EXISTS: You already have a worker profile.
errors.BUSINESS_PROFILE_EXISTS: You already have a business profile.
errors.WORKER_PROFILE_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find your worker profile.
errors.BUSINESS_PROFILE_NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find your business profile.
errors.CLOUDINARY_NOT_CONFIGURED: Image uploads aren't available right now. Please try again later.
errors.FILE_UPLOAD_ERROR: One of your photos couldn't be uploaded. Please try a smaller photo.
errors.INVALID_FILE_TYPE: Please choose a JPEG, PNG, or WEBP image.
errors.INTERNAL_SERVER_ERROR: Something went wrong on our end. Please try again.
errors.UNAUTHORIZED: Your session has expired. Please log in again.
errors.FORBIDDEN: You don't have permission to do that.
errors.NOT_FOUND: We couldn't find what you're looking for.
